escalation.rationale: Active US naval blockade of Iran, ongoing US-Israel strikes, disrupted Strait of Hormuz shipping, and potential Belarus-Ukraine escalation maintain high tensions.

ticker_items: US blockade halts 90% of Iran's sea trade - CENTCOM
Lebanon-Israel direct talks scheduled for Thursday - US confirms
Belarus may attack Ukraine warns former FM Kuleba
Strait of Hormuz shipping disruption expected to continue

eastern_europe.description: Massive nighttime drone strike killed 16-year-old boy and wounded four others
Ukrainian military struck a drone factory in southwestern Russia
Ukrainian drones hit the Tuapse Black Sea oil port causing fire and at least one death.
Russian forces launched drone and missile strikes as spring offensive continues

middle_east.description: US Marines seized Iranian-flagged cargo ship near Hormuz Strait
IDF demolished homes allegedly used by Hezbollah despite ceasefire
US Marines seized Iranian-flagged cargo ship near Hormuz Strait.
Israeli military conducts operations in southern Lebanon despite ceasefire

claimed_totals.claim: Hezbollah terrorists eliminated in Operation Roaring Lion

claimed_totals.figure: 2,076 Iranian, 26 Israeli, 13 US soldiers, 28 Gulf states

ukraine.text: overarching theme of my story is luck
ukraine.speaker: Eddy Scott
ukraine.title: British amputee volunteer

ukraine.text: every dollar paid for Russian oil is money for the war
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: Ukrainian President

middle_east.text: In less than 36 hours since the blockade was implemented, U.S. forces have completely halted economic trade going into and out of Iran by sea
middle_east.speaker: Brad Cooper
middle_east.title: CENTCOM Commander

middle_east.text: Iran is not currently planning to attend talks with the United States
middle_east.speaker: Iranian official
middle_east.title: Senior Iranian official

middle_east.text: When complex nuclear negotiations are treated like a real estate transaction, the outcome is bombing the negotiation table out of spite.
middle_east.speaker: Abbas Araghchi
middle_east.title: Iranian Foreign Minister

middle_east.text: I had the greatest year, the greatest opening year. I ended 8 wars. The greatest economy ever.
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: lots of bombs will go off if deal not made
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Pakistan remains ready to host multi-day US-Iran peace talks as ceasefire deadline approaches. Iran has not committed to attending the second round of talks despite Pakistani mediation efforts.
Reports indicate Iran used Chinese-built spy satellites to target US military bases during operations. China's Foreign Ministry has denied these allegations amid escalating US-Iran tensions.
North Korea fired multiple short-range ballistic missiles in latest testing activity. Analysis shows North Korean missiles used in Ukraine were made with outdated methods from up to 50 years ago.
Germany condemns Russia's publication of arms manufacturers list, calling direct threats unacceptable. Continues support for Ukraine defense production integration with NATO standards.
Turkey reportedly preparing for potential war scenario with Israel as primary target, implementing sweeping military and civilian mobilization changes. NATO summit planned for Turkey in July.

financial.notes: Oil traders expect prolonged higher prices due to Strait of Hormuz disruption and prediction markets suggest traffic won't normalize soon.
